text: you can get so many other consoles for the same price/lower price that are much better than it. I can list all of them: any nintendo ds, an xbox one s, an xbox series s, a switch 1, a ps4-ps4 pro, a used ps5 fat or ps5 slim. I also think that for kids having a main brand is a better experience cause back in the day when i was like 7 i had gotten an xbox for christmas and my dad lrt me buy like 3 games and xbox live gold and i used to grind those 3 games out and llay with my cousins all the time and when i started playing online games i would hop on with my friebds from school every day all day and games were peak back then too. I feel like anybody older than like 5 can handle teen rated games and kids that are 10 or over can handle M rated if they are mature. (i started playing M rated games at 9).
text_zh: 你可以用同样的价格/更低的价格买到很多其他主机，而且比它好多了。我可以全部列出来：任何任天堂 DS，Xbox One S，Xbox Series S，Switch 1，PS4-PS4 Pro，二手的 PS5 fat 或 PS5 slim。我也觉得对孩子们来说，有一个主要品牌能提供更好的体验，因为以前我 7 岁的时候圣诞节收到了一个 Xbox，我爸爸让我买大概 3 个游戏和 Xbox Live Gold，我曾经疯狂玩这 3 个游戏，而且经常和我的表亲们一起玩，当我开始玩在线游戏时，我每天都会和学校的朋友们一起玩，那时候游戏太棒了。我觉得任何超过 5 岁的人都能玩青少年级别的游戏，10 岁以上的孩子如果成熟的话可以玩 M 级游戏。（我 9 岁就开始玩 M 级游戏了）。

text: There's so many more consoles you can buy for cheaper and better. Can't use the argument of the "educational" games either cause you can find educational games on other consoles too especially for kids. Get an Xbox 360 or Xbox One with a Kinect for less than $150. A Wii U for less than $100, Wii for less than $150, heck even 3DSes you can find for around $100 as long as you don't go for any of the special editions. If you're only looking for current gen consoles then yeah it's cheaper but there's many, many MANY better games and consoles you can buy especially for kids.
text_zh: 有那么多更便宜、更好的游戏机可以买。也别拿“教育游戏”说事，因为你在其他游戏机上也能找到教育游戏，尤其适合孩子。花不到 150 刀就能买到 Xbox 360 或 Xbox One 带 Kinect。Wii U 不到 100 刀，Wii 不到 150 刀，甚至 3DS 也能找到 100 刀左右的，只要不是特别版。如果你只看当前一代的游戏机，那确实便宜，但有很多很多很多更好的游戏和游戏机可以买，尤其是给孩子。
